title: ZAWA: Evolved GUI - Dark mode
description: A GUI pack redesigned in ZAWA: Evolved's paintings style.
body:
A GUI pack redesigned in [ZAWA: Evolved](https://modrinth.com/mod/zawa-evolved)'s paintings style.


![Menu screen preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7d4c86dab57935ef0026f3f58aaa6c03ee7d79c.png)


Created with only 1.16.5 in mind, feel free to request other versions as needed.

<details>
<summary>Supported mods list</summary>
  
- Appleskin
- Cosmetic armor reworked
- Curios
- Environmental
- Glasscutter
- Realistic Horse Genetics
- Iron chest
- JEI (just enough items)
- JER (just enough resources)
- JEP (just enough professions)
- Quark
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Tinker's Construct
- Xaero's minimap
- ZAWA: Evolved
</details>
